title: taraxacum hahnii
intro: Taraxacum hahnii, also known as Hahn's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in European folk medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Taraxacum hahnii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which may be beneficial for digestive issues and as a natural diuretic.
